headline: Duracell Messi Tie In Highlights Berkshire Hathaway Brand Power And Valuation
summary: Duracell, a Berkshire Hathaway portfolio company, has released a limited-edition battery line inspired by Lionel Messi’s tattoos. The collection coincides with a major global soccer tournament and marks a first for Duracell’s battery design. The move highlights Berkshire’s use of global sports branding within its consumer portfolio. Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK.A), recently trading around $729,862.0 per share, continues to draw attention not just for its size but for the breadth of its...
